_instructions: Add your comments for each video below. Keys are video names. 'rating' is 1-5, 'notes' is freetext.

_example.notes: Scene looks good but hazard not visible enough. Prompt needs more emphasis on foreground.

gemini_ice_avoided.notes: Initial bad frames. Middle is usable. Pair with stop, icy surface labels.
